TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kanadun ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 611 buwan, 1,469 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 1,211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 258 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Kanadun hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kanadun hya' ga Lalauran. tay mkyahu' na Kanadun hya' ga Davugele. ulay ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. Yasa rhzyal na qalang ki 'Tayal na blaq na llpyung mwah mcisal. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kana*un …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajimari …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēzil na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a lalauran. taj mkjańßu Ē na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a *a*u…£ele. ulaj ulaj qu wańßan mima Ē ru maŇčaj llpjuŇč minkańßul twańßiq. jas~…ēa rńßzjal na qalaŇč ki Ētajal na ő≤laq na llpjuŇč mwańß m ¶~ ®is~…ēal. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Kanadun ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 611 buwan, 1,469 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 1,211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 258 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Kanadun hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kanadun hya' ga Lalauran. tay mkyahu' na Kanadun hya' ga Davugele. ulay ulay qu wahan mima' ru mangay llpyung minkahul twahiq. Yasa rhzyal na qalang ki 'Tayal na blaq na llpyung mwah mcisal. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kana*un …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajimari …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēzil na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a lalauran. taj mkjańßu Ē na kana*un ńßja Ē …£a *a*u…£ele. ulaj ulaj qu wańßan mima Ē ru maŇčaj llpjuŇč minkańßul twańßiq. jas~…ēa rńßzjal na qalaŇč ki Ētajal na ő≤laq na llpjuŇč mwańß m ¶~ ®is~…ēal. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
